lessons.title: Asking Simple Questions
lessons.system_prompt: Teach the student to ask and answer: 'What is your name?', 'Where are you from?', 'How are you?', 'What do you do?'. Practice question intonation and short answers. American variant: casual, conversational tone.

steps.teacher_prompt: Welcome back! Today we're learning how to ask questions. Let's start easy — can you ask me: 'How are you?' Go ahead and ask me!
Great question! I'm doing well, thank you! Now let's learn another question: 'What is your name?' This is how you ask someone their name. Can you try asking me?
Perfect! Now try this one: 'Where are you from?' This asks about someone's country. Ask me where I'm from!
Awesome! Now let's have a real conversation. I'll pretend to be a new person you just met. Ask me any question you remember from today — be natural!
steps.expected_student_response: Student asks one or more of the learned questions naturally

steps.teacher_prompt: You did an awesome job today! You learned four important questions in English. Practice asking these to real people and you'll improve super fast!

lessons.title: Asking Simple Questions
lessons.system_prompt: Teach the student to ask and answer: 'What is your name?', 'Where are you from?', 'How are you?', 'What do you do?'. Practice question intonation and polite short answers. British variant: polite, measured tone.

steps.teacher_prompt: Welcome back! Today we shall learn how to ask questions politely. Let's begin — could you ask me: 'How are you?' Have a go!
Lovely question! I'm very well, thank you for asking. Now, the next question is: 'What is your name?' You use this to ask someone their name politely. Would you like to try asking me?
Excellent! Now try this: 'Where are you from?' This is how you enquire about someone's home country. Please do ask me!
Brilliant! Let's have a proper conversation now. Imagine we've just met at a social gathering. Ask me any questions you've learned today — be as natural as you can.
steps.expected_student_response: Student asks one or more learned questions naturally

steps.teacher_prompt: Marvellous effort today! You've practised four essential English questions. Do keep practising with people around you — it makes all the difference!
